description: Evaluation test cases for deep-search skill v3.0

evals.name: tech-stack-comparison
evals.prompt: Deep search: Compare React vs Vue for enterprise applications in 2024. Focus on community feedback, performance, and real-world pain points.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive comparison with Reddit/HN community feedback, benchmark data, and documented pain points
assertions: Contains community feedback from Reddit or HN

evals.name: academic-research-llm
evals.prompt: Research: Latest LLM safety and alignment research papers from 2023-2024. Need academic rigor with citations.
evals.expected_output: Academic-grade analysis with APA citations, evidence hierarchy, and methodology validation

evals.name: business-due-diligence
evals.prompt: Due diligence analysis of Stripe as a payment processor. Look for hidden fees, regulatory issues, and customer complaints.
evals.expected_output: Risk assessment with specific fee structures, regulatory status, and customer feedback

evals.name: hardware-review
evals.prompt: Deep analysis of Apple M3 MacBook Pro. Need teardown info, benchmarks, and repairability assessment.
evals.expected_output: Component breakdown, performance benchmarks, and repairability score

evals.name: breaking-news-verification
evals.prompt: Verify claims about recent OpenAI GPT-5 announcement. Check multiple sources for contradictions.
evals.expected_output: Timeline analysis with timestamped contradictions and fact-checking
